content.body: How many hours do we have in the meeting? I want to submit a PR for this but I don't know the answer
I think our lunch time and duration depend on local customs.
Oh damn I don't like dutch lunch break customs
nicolo-ribaudo: there is some variance depending on some factors, but generally speaking it is safest to say: (end-start)-100 minutes
content.formatted_body: nicolo-ribaudo: there is some variance depending on some factors, but generally speaking it is safest to say: (end-start)-100 minutes

content.body: that's for hybrid meetings.  remote-only meetings are consistently (end-start)-60 minutes

Hey we published the draft schedule for the TG4 day (Monday): https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/578#issuecomment-4422500268

You are all welcome to join, please react to that comment if you want to do so in person :)
